recent_turns.description: Number of recent conversational turns to protect from compression.

token_budget.description: Maximum output tokens. Null = no limit.

enable_summarization.description: Enable Engine D (abstractive summarization). Requires an LLM provider.

llm_relevance_scoring.description: Use LLM for relevance scoring in Layer 4. Requires an LLM provider.

reorder_segments.description: Enable position optimization (Layer 5). CAUTION: can break API constraints.

dedup_similarity_threshold.description: Cosine similarity threshold for fuzzy deduplication.

entropy_threshold.description: Minimum Shannon entropy (bits/char) to keep a line in verbatim deletion.

token_prune_keep_ratio.description: Fraction of tokens to retain in IDF-based pruning.

json_array_threshold.description: Max items in a JSON array before truncation.

code_keep_signatures.description: Keep function/class signatures in code compression.

relevance_drop_threshold.description: Minimum keyword overlap ratio to survive relevance scoring.

policies.description: Per-content-type policy overrides. Keys are ContentType values, values are CompressionPolicy values.
